Reboot collector?

      
You're about to reboot acme-corp:site-04. This reboots the collector's Ubuntu Linux host — the OS restarts and all four microservices go offline until it comes back up. Buffered telemetry is preserved locally and synced on reconnect.

      

        
        
      

    

    

      

        
        
10

      

      
Sending reboot command…

    

  






  

    

    
Switch to MSP mode?

    
All data in this Enterprise customer will be migrated into a new MSP customer record. This reshapes the whole console and can't be undone.

Suspend this tenant?

    
You're about to suspend tenant. Collectors stay deployed and keep buffering locally, but the tenant is marked Suspended and excluded from active billing until you reactivate it.

    

      
      
    

  





  

    

    
Delete this tenant?

    
This permanently removes tenant from Guardare — its directory record, configuration and branding. Deployed collectors are not touched, but they will no longer report into this tenant. This can't be undone.

    

      
      
    

  





  

    

    
New tenant

    
Create a customer organization. You can complete the rest of its configuration afterward.
